mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_library_attempts (user_id, section_id, score, correct_count, total_questions, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sectionId}, #{score}, #{correctCount}, #{totalQuestions}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, section_id, score, correct_count, total_questions, started_at, completed_at FROM listening_library_attempts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY completed_at DESC
